description: Golden trace for deferred signal behavior parity. Godot queues deferred callbacks and fires them on idle-frame flush in FIFO order. Immediate callbacks fire synchronously during emit_signal.
source: godot behavioral contract + oracle signal_instantiation_connections.json (flags=4 is CONNECT_ONE_SHOT)

deferred_only.description: Three deferred signals emitted in order; callbacks fire only after flush in FIFO order.

mixed_immediate_deferred.description: One immediate and one deferred connection on the same signal. Immediate fires during emit, deferred fires on flush.

one_shot_deferred.description: One-shot connection fires callback once on first emission, then auto-disconnects. Second emission still produces a trace event but no callback.

notes: CONNECT_ONE_SHOT (flags=4) in oracle maps to as_one_shot(). Deferred signals use as_deferred(). Trace records emission events regardless of callback behavior.
